steps.title: Spot the opposition between the two maps
steps.content: The passage contrasts topographic maps (elevation “above sea level”) with bathymetric maps (elevation “below the sea”). The blank must signal this direct opposition.

steps.title: Choose the transition that marks the contrast
steps.content: “By contrast” directly signals opposition between the two map types. The other three fail to mark this relationship: “afterward” implies time, “in conclusion” signals closure, and “for example” implies similarity. This matches choice D — D is correct.
